name: Cape Coral Square Aluminum Dining Table - Silver - Christopher Knight Home: Weather-Resistant, HDPE Top, Seats 4
description: If time and time again you find yourself with a delicious meal and nowhere to set it down upon when dining outdoors, investing in one of our signature square patio dining tables may be just what the doctor ordered. This piece's anodized aluminum frame means it's much more resistant to wear, tear, discoloration, and tarnish than others without; its bold and contemporary presence reinforced with a chic, slatted faux wood table top will make a statement on your porch or patio that your guests will remember for years to come.
